reviews.review_description: This app is so much fun to mess around in. One thing I would like to see added is the ability to grab videos or webpages and place them around the room. It would be amazing to be able to watch Hulu on my bedroom wall.
I like the app however wish it could be placed from a distance. I hate having to get up to move the screen around. Also it needs a way to tilt and level it from afar as well…
It's a trip to many windows that get in the way can't delete them and can't move the screen back without adding windows  very frustrating

developer_response.body:
Hey Gary,
Thanks for being a Transcend XR user! We definitely need to add a tutorial because not all our users find it intuitive... our bad.

Left Grab to move the browser window. 
Right Grab to pull photos and images out of the browser.
B or Y when holding an image (with the grab button held down) will delete an image.

Hopefully this will greatly improve your experience and if you see fit we'd love it if you could update your review/rating.

All the best!

I had connected a Xbox controller with quest two but it still doesn’t work.

developer_response.body:
Hey Ricky,
I'm sorry to hear you are facing issues. We'll get it sorted for you. Please send an email to contact@transcendxr.com and let us know the detail of the problem you are facing and we'll have you enjoying the app in no time.

reviews.review_title: For the price it was amazing
reviews.review_description: It lagged a bit but from time to time, and that was about it,  until recently now I can't log into my Xbox account for cloud gaming and don't understand why it'll for to the login page and then freeze to a white screen

reviews.review_title: like the idea, want more customization
reviews.review_description:
this is a good start and has great potential! here are some of my main thoughts:

• i like the idea of an xr browser but i think to make it a truly immersive experience there should be some customization options. i really love when xr apps offer options to change things like brightness, contrast, tint, color, and maybe even add a glowing edge effect to the passthrough image. this is especially appreciated as a quest 2 user because it allows for a more colorful environment than the dull black and white or can even accommodate a dark mode sort of vibe while still maintaining the original environment elements via passthrough.

• while multiple browser windows would be nice i am sure it would be a hog on the headsets resources. however it would still be preferable to at least have some sort of tabbed browsing setup so that more than one window could be 'open' at the same time even if not all windows are in view.

• your mileage may vary but while xcloud worked and looked amazing, there was noticeable input lag of at least half a second for me which makes it pretty unusable. it could be an internet speed issue but my other devices handle xcloud ust fine so idk. i tried it both with bluetooth and by connecting the xbone controller directly to the headset with usb c but the lag was present either way.

• i really want to be able to push and pull browser windows and images forward and backward so i don't have to physically move to the location that i want to place them with my controller. it may sound lazy but it is also an accessibility issue (what if i want to make my screen huge and place it up high on a wall but i have difficulty moving around? etc.) 

• please move the information in the slideshow that you can access by clicking the "?" button in the browser to a menu that is accessed by the physical menu button on the touch controller - it just makes more sense and is a place i expect it to be whereas it took me a bit too long to find as is.

• it would be really cool to have the ability to save and load "rooms" so that way you could create different collections or themes with the images that you transcend or even the different colored environments you create if you decided to go that route.

hope you read and consider. i do really enjoy this app as is but wanted to give my thoughts on ways it could be really really cool. thanks for making it!

reviews.review_title: Works well for Xbox game cloud
reviews.review_description: Few games wouldnt connect to Xbox controller Forza 5 is amazing on oculas

developer_response.body:
Hey stevoosturtri,
Would you be kind enough to drop me a mail at contact@transcendxr.com with more details and I'll investigate further.

reviews.review_description:
Can’t get my series S controller to work.  Quest says it’s connected but app doesn’t see it.  
Super excited to try this.  Even at the new higher price.  Any help?

developer_response.body:
Hi SpartanJer,
The Meta Quest System software prior to v49 had issues connecting series S controllers over bluetooth. Once your Quest's system software is updated to v49 it will connect and work as expected.
Please go to Settings -> System -> Software Update, in the Oculus menus, update your software to v49 and retry. All versions on that screen should start with 49. I've heard of Quest users who have had to restart several times to get all versions to 49 and even some users that had to factory reset to get the meta update to apply correctly.
Please update the review to confirm it resolves your issue. If you need further assistance email me at contact@transcendxr.com and we can go through it in detail.
Thanks for being a Transcend XR user!

reviews.review_description: It was pretty great up until it started flickering violently and I could not find the browser. I’ve restarted my headset and uninstalled and reinstalled it multiple times and yet still I can’t use the app

developer_response.body: This is not an issue we've seen before. Please drop us an email at contact@transcendxr.com and we'll walk through it in detail and get it resolved for you. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: I got transcend xr how do I close the tabs

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Whilst you are holding a window (with the grab button) press either 'B' or 'Y' depending on which hand you are holding the window with. This will remove it. My bad, this likely requires a better explanation.

reviews.review_title: Great to play Xbox game pass on
reviews.review_description: This app is a game changer. The big feature is Xbox cloud gaming which works well on the quest. It can also work as a web browser where you can pick images up and put them anywhere. If you want to play though, you’ll have to connect a ps5 or Xbox controller or really any Bluetooth controller but you can’t use joycons. It’s a must buy for any Xbox fan who can’t really bring a clunky console around to play games anywhere. I love it. 10/10

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review Osk15. So glad you are enjoying the app. I honestly believe that with Transcend XR the Quest is now the best portable big screen gaming device!
I hadn't thought of adding joycon compatibility. I'll look into it.

reviews.review_description: If you’re looking to play Xbox game-pass on your oculus this is the way to go. You don’t have to sideload anything, no pc or android device needed, just install this app and you’re good to go! Xbox controller linked up perfectly with no issues and worked just fine, occasional lag “cloud” unrelated to this app. The app also has the ability to pull pictures and stuff from the web which is a nice touch because you can decorate your “game room”. No issues logging in to cloud services and the picture quality is decent. You can change the size of the screen from regular to otherworldly as well. Great app! Highly recommend!

reviews.review_title: One step in the right direction
reviews.review_description:
Cloud gaming is the future for VR, longing for the day when you can cloud game from all different platforms directly into your Quest, I know you can use different apps for this already, I play GFN through VD sometimes, but to have it natively and remove the need for a large hard drive in the unit would be great.
This clearly is a step in the right direction, good job !👍
The app is working perfecly fine, only problem is loging in google mail. If they fix the problem it will be 5 stars
This would be great if you could watch videos in full screen, and if there wasn’t a weird semi transparent world floor that ruins pass through mode.

Great app and a must have capability (an actual browser).
Still feels pretty fresh and really needs some features, but out of the gate it's amazing. 
For the future please add some tabs, a second (or more) windows would be amazing, offer the ability toblank the passthrough, let us operate in oculus "home", etc.
Really a great app but now needs to move forward.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review Snoman002. We really appreciate you taking the time to provide feedback and feature requests. We'll roll up our sleeves and provide further updates soon!

reviews.review_description: Thank you (Development Team Name Here) for helping me achieve a state of Nirvana by way of your browser and Xbox Game Pass. I never saw the interest in meditation apps until today. The feeling I got when the humming bell washed through my ears and the Xbox logo shimmered before me in AR was truly transcendence .... XR??

Works flawlessly with Xbox game pass.
